scripts.serve: npm run build && if exist "..\.tools\jre17\jdk-17.0.18+8-jre\bin\java.exe" (set "JAVA_HOME=..\.tools\jre17\jdk-17.0.18+8-jre" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,storage --project fibrebros --config ../firebase.json) else (firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,storage --project fibrebros --config ../firebase.json)
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions --project fibrebros --config ../firebase.json
